scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @forge/shared && npm run build --workspace @forge/agent && npm run build --workspace @forge/ui && npm run build --workspace @forge/web && npm run build --workspace @forge/runner
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @forge/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @forge/agent && npm run typecheck --workspace @forge/ui && npm run typecheck --workspace @forge/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @forge/runner
